tasks.title: Set up QR Scanner dependencies
tasks.description: Install and configure the necessary libraries for QR code scanning functionality.
tasks.details:
Install the required dependencies for QR code scanning:
- Install react-qr-reader or @zxing/library and @zxing/browser
- Configure dynamic imports to avoid SSR issues
- Test basic camera access using MediaDevices API
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the dependencies are properly installed and can be imported without errors.

tasks.title: Create QrScanner component
tasks.description: Build a reusable QR scanner component with camera access and scanning functionality.
tasks.details:
Create a client-side QrScanner component that:
- Requests camera permissions
- Supports both front-facing and rear-facing cameras
- Allows switching between cameras
- Provides visual feedback during scanning
- Handles camera permission errors
- Works on desktop and mobile devices
tasks.testStrategy: Test the component with various devices and browsers to ensure camera access works correctly. Verify the component provides appropriate feedback when permissions are denied.

tasks.title: Implement QR verification API route
tasks.description: Create an API endpoint to validate QR codes and return ticket information.
tasks.details:
Implement the /api/qr/verify route that:
- Parses QR code data (transaction ID, URL, or JSON)
- Fetches transaction details from the backend
- Validates ticket status (not REFUNDED or CANCELLED)
- Returns validation result with transaction details
- Handles errors gracefully
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various QR code formats, valid and invalid tickets, and network error scenarios.

tasks.title: Create Admin QR Scanner page
tasks.description: Build the admin page for scanning QR codes and validating tickets.
tasks.details:
Create the /admin/qr-scanner page that:
- Integrates the QrScanner component
- Handles scan results and sends them to the verification API
- Displays validation results with clear visual feedback
- Redirects to the check-in page for valid tickets
- Handles errors with appropriate messages
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete flow from scanning to verification to redirection. Verify all error states are handled properly.

tasks.title: Update Check-In Flow
tasks.description: Enhance the existing check-in page to work seamlessly with QR scanner.
tasks.details:
Update the existing check-in page to:
- Pre-populate form when accessed via QR scan
- Add "Scan Another QR Code" button
- Improve check-in success feedback
- Update the database with check-in status, time, and number of guests
tasks.testStrategy: Test the entire check-in process using the QR scanner to verify that tickets are properly checked in and the UI provides clear feedback.

tasks.title: Create Check-In History Server Actions
tasks.description: Implement server actions to fetch check-in history and analytics data.
tasks.details:
Create server actions that:
- Fetch check-in history with pagination and filtering
- Calculate check-in analytics (total, percentage, timeline)
- Support date range filtering
- Use fetchWithJwtRetry for backend calls
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various filter parameters and verify the data matches what's in the database.

tasks.title: Implement Check-In Analytics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard to visualize check-in statistics and history.
tasks.details:
Build the check-in analytics dashboard that shows:
- Real-time check-in count
- Check-in percentage
- Check-in timeline chart
- Check-ins by ticket type
- Filterable check-in history list
- Date range selector
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all charts and statistics accurately reflect the data. Test date range filtering.

tasks.title: Implement Check-In Export functionality
tasks.description: Add the ability to export check-in data to CSV and Excel formats.
tasks.details:
Create export functionality that:
- Exports check-in data to CSV format
- Exports check-in data to Excel format
- Includes attendee details, check-in time, and ticket type
- Supports date range filtering
- Handles large datasets efficiently
tasks.testStrategy: Test exports with various data sizes and verify the exported files contain the correct information.

tasks.title: Create Sales Analytics Server Actions
tasks.description: Implement server actions to fetch sales analytics data.
tasks.details:
Create server actions that:
- Fetch sales data with filtering
- Calculate revenue metrics (gross, net, fees)
- Generate sales trends over time
- Break down sales by ticket type
- Support date range filtering
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various filter parameters and verify the calculations are accurate.

tasks.title: Implement Enhanced Sales Dashboard
tasks.description: Create an improved sales dashboard with charts and detailed analytics.
tasks.details:
Build the enhanced sales dashboard that shows:
- Sales trends over time (line chart)
- Revenue by ticket type (pie/bar chart)
- Daily/hourly sales breakdown
- Discount code usage statistics
- Refund statistics
- Average ticket price
- Customizable date ranges
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all charts and statistics accurately reflect the data. Test date range filtering.

tasks.title: Implement Sales Report Export functionality
tasks.description: Add the ability to export sales data to multiple formats.
tasks.details:
Create export functionality that:
- Exports sales data to CSV format
- Exports sales data to Excel format
- Exports sales data to PDF format (optional)
- Includes transaction details, amounts, discounts, refunds
- Supports date range filtering
- Handles large datasets efficiently
tasks.testStrategy: Test exports with various data sizes and verify the exported files contain the correct information.

tasks.title: Implement Mobile Optimization for QR Scanner
tasks.description: Ensure the QR scanner works well on mobile devices.
tasks.details:
Optimize the QR scanner for mobile devices:
- Test and fix issues on iOS Safari
- Test and fix issues on Android Chrome
- Handle mobile camera orientation changes
- Optimize for mobile performance (battery, processing)
- Provide touch-friendly controls
tasks.testStrategy: Test on various mobile devices and browsers to ensure consistent performance.

tasks.title: Implement Error Handling for QR Scanner
tasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling for the QR scanner.
tasks.details:
Implement error handling for:
- Camera permission denial
- Invalid QR codes
- Network errors during validation
- Duplicate check-ins
- Expired or invalid tickets
- Provide clear error messages for each case
tasks.testStrategy: Test each error scenario to verify appropriate error messages are displayed.

tasks.title: Create Custom Date Range Selector component
tasks.description: Build a reusable date range selector for analytics dashboards.
tasks.details:
Create a date range selector component that:
- Allows selection of custom date ranges
- Provides preset options (last 7 days, last 30 days, etc.)
- Updates parent components when range changes
- Has a clean, intuitive interface
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various date selections and verify the component correctly updates.

tasks.title: Implement Check-In History View
tasks.description: Create a filterable, paginated view of check-in history.
tasks.details:
Build a check-in history view that:
- Displays a chronological list of check-ins
- Shows attendee name, ticket type, check-in time, number of guests
- Supports filtering by date range and ticket type
- Includes pagination for large datasets
- Allows searching by attendee name or email
tasks.testStrategy: Test pagination, filtering, and search functionality with various datasets.

tasks.title: Implement Revenue Analytics Components
tasks.description: Create components to display detailed revenue statistics.
tasks.details:
Create components that display:
- Gross revenue (total sales)
- Net revenue (after discounts, refunds)
- Platform fees
- Tax amounts
- Revenue by payment method
- Revenue trends (daily, weekly, monthly)
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all revenue calculations are accurate and reflect the data in the database.

tasks.title: Add Navigation Links to Admin Menu
tasks.description: Update the admin menu to include links to new features.
tasks.details:
Add navigation links to:
- QR Scanner page
- Check-In Analytics dashboard
- Enhanced Sales Reports
- Ensure proper access control for admin-only routes
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the links appear correctly in the admin menu and lead to the right pages.

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Testing
tasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of all implemented features.
tasks.details:
Test all features according to the testing strategy:
- QR Scanner testing on multiple devices and browsers
- Check-In Analytics data accuracy and filtering
- Sales Reports calculations and exports
- Error handling in all components
- Performance testing for large datasets
tasks.testStrategy: Follow the testing strategy outlined in the PRD for each feature.
